moves.name: Peach Parasol
moves.notes: Frame data refers to peach rising, 11 hits total (no info on %s). can fast fall as soon as frame 56. Land lag with parasol closed is 4 frames.

moves.name: Toad
moves.notes: when hit, invincible for 8 frames. 1st sport released on that 8th frame. lasts 78 frames total. 7 hits of 3% damage

moves.name: Peach Bomber
moves.notes: additional 27 frames of lag if you don't land. if hit, 28 frames of lag from time of hit
